Object.Name: Vendor Specific Measurement Quality Reason
Object.Description1: This object contains description for vendor specific measurement quality reason codes provided in a Measurement Metadata (509) object. Instances of this object define the mapping of vendor specific reason codes to reason description in the scope of an individual device.

Item.Name: Vendor Specific Quality Reason Code
Item.Description: Measurement quality degradation reason reported by a smart sensor. Reason codes 0-127 are generic reason codes and they are defined in Measurement Metadata object description. 128-511: VENDOR_SPECIFIC_BLOCK Vendor specific block. This block contains vendor specific quality reason codes. 512-1023: RESERVED_VENDOR_BLOCK Reserved vendor specific block. This block is reserved for future use.

Item.Name: Quality Reason Name
Item.Description: The name of the quality reason. It is used as a key to find a localized reason description. The name should be concise and unique in the localization scope.

Item.Name: Quality Reason Description
Item.Description: Description of the quality reason. This text can be used if a localized version is not found.
